"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 20:42 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
def files(g): return [str(p) for p in sorted(Path('.').glob(g)) if p.is_file()]
route=load('governance/state/bem812_route_after_bem811.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
responses=files('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/*')
results=files('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/*.status.json')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
if rs=='next_filter_response':
    status='filter_response_execution_needed'; next_action='filter response files and process only real Claude answer'
elif rs=='next_verify_dispatch_target':
    status='dispatch_target_diagnosis'; next_action='verify dispatcher workflow file validity and latest result status'
elif rs=='next_patch_pat_env':
    status='pat_env_patch_needed'; next_action='patch secret name/wiring if result says token_missing'
elif rs=='next_patch_dispatch_target':
    status='dispatch_target_patch_needed'; next_action='patch workflow id/ref/permissions'
elif rs=='next_patch_claude_runtime':
    status='claude_runtime_patch_needed'; next_action=route.get('next_action')
else:
    status='infra_repair_continue'; next_action=route.get('next_action')
state={'bem':'BEM-813','status':status,'route_status':rs,'response_files':responses[-10:],'dispatch_results':results[-10:],'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem813_execute_bem812_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem813_execute_bem812_route.md').write_text('# BEM-813 | Execute BEM-812 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem813_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-813'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem813_execute_bem812_route.json','governance/reports/bem813_execute_bem812_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem813_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-812 route by collecting response files, dispatch results, and runtime state')
